Description:
Social House is looking for a reliable, motivated Morning Cook to join our team! If you’re passionate about good food, enjoy working in a fast-paced environment, and have a positive attitude, we want to hear from you.

🔸 Schedule: 6:30/7:00 AM – 3:00/3:30 PM

✨ What We’re Looking For:
Previous kitchen or line-cook experience required
Strong work ethic and ability to stay organized during busy service periods
Ability to follow recipes, maintain consistency, and uphold food-safety standards
Dependable and punctual
Team-oriented attitude with good communication skills

🔧 Responsibilities Include:
Preparing breakfast and lunch menu items
Setting up and stocking stations before service
Maintaining a clean and orderly kitchen
Assisting with prep work
Following proper food handling and sanitation procedures
If you're ready to be part of a supportive, energetic team and start your mornings with purpose, we’d love to meet you!

Description: As a Delivery Driver, you are our “Boots on the ground!”, and the main face that our Insomniacs see outside of the bakery! You give the word “Delivery” a whole new meaning by delivering the Cookie Magic to our fans wherever they are.

As a member of the Cookie Crew you are the ultimate Insomniac. Not only are you the point person at the front of the store for interacting with our customers, but you also get to bake all of our awesome Warm and Delicious cookies as well!

As a Shift Leader, you are the captain of our bakery day or night! You understand what it takes to “Own the Night” (and beyond), by predicting the flow of business during a successful shift. Your hands-on leadership style should not only include building orders, suggestive selling, baking, and interacting with customers – it will also mean taking pride in knowing that your prowess as a leading Insomniac attributes to a productive and fun night for your store!

We’re looking for a lead to join our team. This person will work front and back of house, and specialize in an aspect of the business.

This full time position includes a benefits package.

Train in Cuppa Tahoe front, back, & barista services with associated pay increases
Client interaction

Food & beverage preparation

Clean the front and back of house

This is done during the hours that we’re closed, and has no customer interaction.

POS and taking orders

The Barista at Edgewood Tahoe Resort will have a deep appreciation for specialty coffee, a keen eye for detail, and a commitment to outstanding customer service. The Barista ensures all beverages are prepared, presented, and served according to the resort's standards, and is dedicated to delivering an exceptional coffee experience.

The Busser/Food Runner is responsible for maintaining a clean and organized dining area, assisting servers with various tasks, and delivering food from the kitchen to customers. This role ensures guests receive exceptional dining experience by helping to keep the restaurant running smoothly, efficiently, and with excellent customer service.

As a Host at Edgewood Tahoe Resort, you will be responsible for greeting and seating guests in a polite, friendly, and professional manner. The Host ensures that the guest experience is pleasant from the moment guests arrive until they are seated. The Host plays an important role in managing reservations, maintaining a smooth flow of guests, and supporting the front-of-house staff.

Join the Pet Station Pack! We're not just a team, we're a pack dedicated to supporting each other, providing outstanding care to animals, and delivering an exceptional experience to every customer. As a Sales Associate at Pet Station, you'll be the friendly face and knowledgeable resource for our customers and their furry, scaled, or feathered friends. With a passion for pets and a commitment to exceptional service, you'll be a key member of our team!
